First H1 Tag

This page has multiple H1 tags which is an SEO issue. Only one H1 should be used per page.

Second H1 Tag — This is the problem

Having multiple H1 tags confuses search engines about the primary topic of the page.

Third H1 Tag — Even worse

Three H1 tags on one page is a clear issue that should be flagged by the SEO audit tool.

A Proper H2 Subheading

H2 tags are fine to have multiple of — only H1 should be unique.
